name: Gorre Dinesh Chandan Reddy

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
details: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms (C++), Object-Oriented Programming System(OOPS), Database Managment System(DBMS), Software Engineering,Computer Networks,Deep Learning

points: Developed robust and scalable solutions using Python, ensuring high-quality code deliverables.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy AI/ML models and data pipelines.
Optimized application performance, improved code robustness, and fixed bugs using unit testing.
Designed and developed a Flask application, deploying it on AWS EC2, and ensuring high availability and scalability.
Worked on bug fixing, improving application performance, and collaborating with teams to define and ship new features.

projects.title: Image-Based Entity Extraction with PyTesseract
points: Employed OCR technology to extract key information from product images, developing an adaptive solution for mobile devices.
Processed a large dataset, achieving 56% accuracy on the test dataset, and identifying potential challenges.

projects.title: Mars Landmark Detection System
points: Developed an end-to-end deep learning project, training a model to classify images into eight classes representing Martian landmarks.
Handled over 8,200 training images and 2,000 testing images, achieving 89% accuracy on the test dataset.

achievements: Amazon ML Challenge - Top 200 out of 18500 teams
